user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my shift assignments in a list, so that I can see which shifts I am scheduled to work
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Shift Assignment screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for Shift name, From date, End date, Start time, End time, Assigned by, Assigned date and Status

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my shift assignments by a period From and To date, so that I can review shifts for a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Shift Assignment screen; When I set a Period From and To date and click Search; Then only shift assignments within that range are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter shift assignments by a specific Shift, so that I can find assignments for a particular shift schedule
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Shift Assignment screen; When I select a Shift and click Search; Then only assignments for that shift are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter shift assignments by Status, so that I can focus on Assigned, Pending approval, Approved, Rejected or Cancelled assignments
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Shift Assignment screen; When I select a Status and click Search; Then only assignments with that status are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see who assigned my shift and when, so that I can identify the source and date of each assignment
acceptance_criteria: Given shift assignments exist; When I view the list; Then each row shows the Assigned by and Assigned date values

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset filters and refresh the shift list, so that I can clear selections and load the latest assignments
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset and then Refresh; Then the filters clear and the list reloads with current shift assignments
